Heads up: the parser looks for a block shaped like `<!-- frame-spine ... -->` and reads until the matching closer, so don't paste a raw one into a code review comment unless you mean it.

<!-- frame-spine
spine_schema_version: 2
generated_at: 2026-07-18T22:20:00Z
coverage: complete
slice_comment_id: 5013460780
ports:
  implement-docs: [s1, s3#cycle:2, s7#cycle:3#terminal]
  implement-test: [s2, s4#cycle:2#terminal]
  implement-code: [s5, s6#cycle:2#terminal]
  review: [s8#terminal]
  ce-gate-cli: [s9#terminal]
slices:
  s1:
    execution_mode: serial
    rc: exhaustive marker-reader inventory committed as a tracked artifact
    ac_refs: [AC4]
    depends_on: []
    cycle: 1
-->
